top_signals.title: Oil From US Emergency Reserve Heads to California
top_signals.summary: A cargo of oil from the U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve headed to California this month for the first time ever, ship tracking service Kpler said.The unusual movement highlights the redrawing of trade flows and shipping routes as the Iran war has cut off supplies of Middle Eastern crude.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil markets are betting on a swift end to the Iran war. Investors may regret it
top_signals.summary: Oil markets remain volatile as traders struggle to interpret contradictory signals on prospects for U.S.-Iran peace agreement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan and Philippines agree to elevate ties to new level amid China concerns
top_signals.summary: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. and Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi also said they would begin formal negotiations on a key intelligence-sharing pact.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Rally in chip stocks becomes the most hated in history. Here's the data
top_signals.summary: The rally in semiconductor stocks is so incredible, traders can't help but bet against it.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin’s famous CME gaps are about to disappear, though three remain unresolved
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff outlines his plan to turn around his struggling stock
top_signals.summary: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff said the company’s strategy during its stock slump is to continue delivering strong products for customers and buy back shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Nuclear guarantees cannot replace U.S. forces in Europe.

top_signals.title: CVS to restore coverage of Zepbound, add Eli Lilly's obesity pill to drug plans
top_signals.summary: CVS will add Zepbound coverage on Oct. 1, and start covering Lilly's newly approved Foundayo pill on June 1.

top_signals.title: Carnival Cruise confirms data breach affecting nearly 6 million people
top_signals.summary: Carnival Corporation, the world's largest cruise line operator, has confirmed a data breach affecting nearly 6 million people claimed by the ShinyHunters extortion gang in April 2026. [...]
